HealthFirst Patient Portal

A comprehensive patient portal enabling appointment scheduling, secure messaging, prescription refills, and health record access for a 50-physician practice.

The Challenge

HealthFirst Medical Group was struggling with high call volumes and a manual appointment scheduling process that hindered patient satisfaction and operational efficiency. Patients needed a more convenient way to manage their healthcare tasks outside of office hours.

The Solution

We developed a fully integrated patient portal that connects directly to their EHR system. The solution included intuitive scheduling tools, a secure messaging platform for patient-provider communication, and automated prescription renewal requests.

Inspire Foundation Dashboard

A real-time analytics dashboard tracking program outcomes, donor impact, and operational metrics for a national nonprofit.

The Challenge

Inspire Foundation was managing their data across multiple spreadsheets and disparate systems, making it difficult to report outcomes to donors and make data-driven decisions. They needed a unified, real-time view of their organizational performance.

The Solution

We implemented a centralized data warehouse and a custom Power BI dashboard. The solution provides real-time visualizations of program effectiveness, donor retention rates, and financial health, with automated reporting tools and a dedicated portal for high-level donors.

Pacific University LMS

A custom learning management system serving 25,000 students with accessible design, integrated video conferencing, and advanced analytics.

Pacific University needed a modern, scalable, and highly accessible LMS to support their growing hybrid learning programs. Their existing solution was outdated, difficult to use on mobile devices, and lacked critical accessibility features for diverse student needs.
